channel.title: personal on khalid.se
channel.description: Recent content in personal on khalid.se

item.title: About me
item.description: I am a IT and security manager at an international NGO in Sweden, and this is where I publish my presentations of intrest, my contact information and do some crazy experimentation behind the scenes. What I like doing Link to heading Working out Socializing Hiking and being in nature Advocate for digital privacy Solving old and new problems in new ways What I’m doing now Link to heading Some of my projects are listed here, this section is updated quaterly

item.title: Contact
item.description: You are welcome to reach out to me on the following links: 🧑🏽‍💻 Github 🧑🏽‍💼 LinkedIn 🐘 Mastodon 💬 Matrix: @khalid:data.haus 📧 Email: khalid-se.br9ty[at]slmail.me 🔐 PGP public key Work of interest Link to heading 👁️‍🗨️ Surveillance based ads, and their impact on society (Handouts, in Swedish) link. ✊🏽 Cybersecurity for activists, a seminar covering Cybersecurity basics. link 🏳️‍🌈 Oppressed Pride , master thesis in Social Work. link
